records.summary: Contact page for Three Boons Yoga Berlin featuring a contact form, addresses for two studio locations (Mitte and Kreuzberg), phone numbers, and email addresses. Embedded maps appear present via Google Maps markers, but opening hours are not listed.
records.notes: Key contact details are all present but buried below the contact form rather than above the fold, and opening hours are entirely missing, which hurts usability and local SEO.
